title: Kyoto Geisha Walking Tour: Gion District & Hidden Gems
abstract: Join an experienced local guide on an informative walking tour of the historic Gion Geisha district in Kyoto which is renowned for traditional wooden teahouses, Geisha culture, temples, and shrines.

title: Osaka: Shinsekai Food Tour with 13-15 Dishes at 5 Eateries
abstract: Try 13-15 dishes included at 5 local eateries and 2 drinks on this food tour. Visit the whole range from backstreet stall, izakaya, specialized eatery & tachinomiya to discover the best of Osaka.

title: Best of Kyoto: Gion, Geisha, Pagodas & Cobblestones
abstract: Take a stroll through the Gion and Higashiyama district of Kyoto, see impressive sights, explore the charming lantern-lit cobblestoned streets, and maybe even catch a glimpse of a real-life geisha!

title: Kyoto: Gion Geisha District Walking Tour - Stories of Geisha
abstract: Discover Kyoto's geisha culture on a guided walking tour. Explore the city's old geisha district with a local guide and learn about this captivating culture.

title: Osaka: Hotspots & Hidden Gems Walking Tour Private or Group
abstract: Discover Osaka on a group tour (meet in Namba) or private tour (meet at central hotel). Explore during the day or at night and see cobblestone streets, billboards, seafood markets, alleys, and more.

title: Kyoto: Fushimi Inari, Kinkakuji, Bamboo Grove 1 Day Bus Tour
abstract: Discover the best of ancient Kyoto in a single day on this comprehensive guided tour by bus. Immerse yourself in the city's most important UNESCO World Heritage Sites and historical highlights.

title: Hungry Osaka Street Food Tour: 15 Tastings & 3 Drinks
abstract: Enjoy an award-winning Osaka street food tour. Explore Shinsekai’s hidden gems and feast like a local. Enjoy 15 local dishes and 3 drinks at some of Osaka’s most authentic neighborhood spots.

title: Tokyo: Mt. Fuji Tour, Hakone Ropeway, Owakudani, Lake Ashi
abstract: Embark on a scenic journey to explore Mt. Fuji, visit Hakone Shrine, discover the volcanic Lake Ashi, Yamanaka and Owakudani Valley. Take a panoramic cable car to see the beautiful Mt. Fuji.

title: Osaka: Deep Backstreets Walking Tour with Dinner Option
abstract: Explore the non-tourist areas of Osaka, where the veil of "perfect Japan" will be lifted. Get an unfiltered understanding of how the city really functions in the abandoned buildings area, retro zone, alleys, redlight district, gambling dens, and more.

title: Tokyo Bay: Cruise with Japan Show & Sukiyaki/Tokyo Tower
abstract: Experience Japan's history, culture, and modern charm on a Yakatabune dinner cruise. Savor sukiyaki accompanied by soft drinks, performances, and stunning night views of Tokyo's skyline.

title: Kyoto: Kendo and Samurai Experience with Uniform and Gear
abstract: Step into the world of the samurai with this authentic sword-handling and kendo experience in Kyoto. Wear real training gear and practice cutting techniques using safe swords under expert guidance.

title: Tokyo: Samurai Restaurant Show Ticket with 2 Drinks
abstract: Visit the Samurai Restaurant during your stay in Tokyo. Head to Kabukicho, where you’re sure to be amazed by the gorgeous interior and a neon light and sound show that you will never forget.

title: Kyoto: Insider Sake Brewery Tour with Sake and Food Pairing
abstract: An Expert-Guided Sake Tasting & Brewery Tour in Kyoto. Your Japan trip gets better once you truly enjoy sake. In 3 hours, taste, visit a local brewery, and discover how to choose sake with confidence.

title: Kyoto: Tea Museum Tickets and Matcha Grinding Experience
abstract: Explore tea culture with tickets to Chazna Museum in Uji. Dive into the town's history through exhibits, grind matcha with a stone mill experience, and brew your own with a Japanese tea instructor.

title: Osaka Sumo Experience: Sumo Show, Try Sumo & Hot Pot Meal
abstract: A sumo show in Osaka where you don’t just watch—join true rikishi basics training and challenge a former wrestler. Finish with optional chanko nabe and unforgettable in-ring photos.

title: Tokyo: Samurai Sword & Archery Class from Samurai Descendant
abstract: During this experience in Tokyo, you will receive a lecture on Japanese swords, learn katana (slashing forms), practice sparring, and try out bows and arrows, as well as try slashing with a mock sword

title: Kyoto: Samurai Sword Class by Experts in Traditional Arts
abstract: Prepare for battle as you learn the skills of the samurai during a class in Kyoto. Study the basic techniques of the ancient Japanese warriors and get an introduction to the samurai art.

title: Kyoto Gion Cultural Walk & Geisha Show with Dining Options
abstract: Discover the culture and life of being a geisha hidden behind the sliding doors of Gion on a walking tour. Watch a live geisha show and enjoy dinner, lunch or tea with an apprentice geisha, Maiko.

title: Tokyo: Zen Meditation at a Private Temple with a Monk
abstract: Practice Zen meditation at a secluded temple in Asakusa, Tokyo with personal guidance from a monk. Partake in a matcha tea ceremony and take photos at the end.

title: Tokyo: teamLab Planets TOKYO Digital Art Museum Entry Ticket
abstract: Explore the immersive exhibits within teamLab Planets TOKYO, a must-see attraction on any visit to Tokyo. Discover digital art installations made of lights, sounds, and different materials to delight all five senses.

title: Tokyo: Japanese Dance Cabaret Theater Asakusa-Kaguwa Ticket
abstract: Experience Japanese dance at Asakusa Tokyo and sip on the included drink as the show carries you into the night. Take a seat in the stylish venue and watch elegant dancers in elaborate kimonos.

title: Kyoto: Ramen, Gyoza, and Onigiri Cooking Class
abstract: Discover how to make homemade rich and flavorful soy sauce and miso ramen, acquire the perfect Gyoza filling, and master the technique of wrapping gyoza for the ideal shape and seal.

title: Kyoto: Early Morning Tour with English-Speaking Guide
abstract: Beat the crowds and explore the main sights of Kyoto on a guided tour of the 10,000 torii gates at Fushimi-Inari Shrine, Golden Temple aka Kinkakuji, and the Bamboo Forrest in Arashiyama.

title: Kyoto: Zen Experience in a Hidden Temple
abstract: Experience Zen in a quiet temple that is closed to the public. Receive direct instruction from Zen monks on meditation and Matcha whilst you enjoy a sophisticated and extraordinary experience.

title: Kyoto: Arashiyama Customized Rickshaw Tour & Bamboo Forest
abstract: Together with your personal guide, enjoy a rickshaw tour through Arashiyama, one of Kyoto's greenest, most picturesque and historic neighborhoods.

title: Osaka: Namba Pub Bar Crawl with a Local Guide
abstract: Check out Osaka's trendiest izakayas and bars with a local guide on this pub crawl in Namba. Purchase some local cuisine and have the chance to try drinks like sake, plum wine, whisky, and craft beer.

title: Kyoto/Osaka: Nara, Fushimi Inari Taisha, Arashiyama Bus Tour
abstract: Join a tour from Osaka or Kyoto. See Nara’s tame deer, step into Fushimi Inari’s mystical Senbon Torii, stroll through the whispering bamboo of Arashiyama, visit Togetsukyō Bridge and Nonomiya Shrine.

title: Osaka: Izakaya Bars Guided Walking Tour
abstract: Have a fun night out in Osaka on a bar crawl led by a guide. Visit 3 hidden hotspots only locals know about, for a glimpse into the Japanese nightlife and party scene.

title: Osaka: teamLab Botanical Garden Entry Ticket
abstract: Marvel at the interaction between art and nature at the Nagai Botanical Garden in Osaka. Enjoy entry into the unique venue which turns from a botanical garden during the day into an art space at night.

title: Osaka: Sumo Experience with Live Show & Audience Challenge
abstract: Experience the power and tradition of sumo wrestling in Osaka. Watch a live show with retired wrestlers, learn about the sport's history, and even step into the ring yourself.

title: Arashiyama Bamboo, Temple, Monkeys, or Secret Sake Brewery
abstract: Take a tour of the district of Arashiyama in Kyoto with a guide. Visit Arashiyama Park, the Okochi Sanso Garden, and Tenryuji Temple, walk around the monkey park, and browse the local shopping street.

title: Kyoto: Tea Ceremony Meditation - Make Matcha with Tea Master
abstract: Enjoy an interactive matcha-making experience with friendly, English-speaking hosts, offering a meaningful connection to Japanese culture — and take home a high-quality souvenir with a story to share.

title: Authentic knife making experience at a blacksmith in Kyoto
abstract: Through this experience, you will learn about “forging” in depth. You will learn how to use the tools and make a knife using the same traditional process as Japanese kitchen knives.

title: Kyoto: Meet the Geisha Maiko with Gion Walking Tour
abstract: Meet a Maiko, a geisha in Kyoto, and enjoy a walking tour in Gion, the geisha district. See an authentic Japanese tradition unfold before your eyes that has existed for hundreds of years.

title: Tokyo: Sumo Show and Experience in Shinjuku
abstract: Experience the power of sumo wrestling in Shinjuku. Watch live sparring matches, learn about the rituals, and step into the ring to challenge a sumo wrestler yourself.

title: Osaka/Kyoto: Hiroshima Miyajima Bus Tour & Shinkansen Ticket
abstract: Discover popular sightseeing spots by bus in Hiroshima on a tour from Osaka or Kyoto with return bullet train tickets. This tour is conducted by an English-speaking guide only.

title: Kyoto: Arashiyama Bamboo, Matcha, Monkeys & Temple Tour
abstract: Explore Kyoto’s Arashiyama with temple visits, bamboo groves, matcha tea, and monkeys—an unforgettable mix of culture, nature, and adventure.

title: Osaka: Dotonbori River Cruise with Glico Sign & Neon Views
abstract: The ultimate way to explore Osaka! A relaxing cruise along the Dotonbori River. Hop on a 20-minute cruise and enjoy iconic views of Osaka’s Minami area from the water—including the famous Glico sign.

title: Kyoto: Kintsugi Workshop in Gion - Japanese Gold Repair
abstract: Discover the art of Kintsugi in a Kyoto workshop. Repair ceramics with golden powder.

title: Kyoto: Insider Sake Experience with 7 Tastings and Snacks
abstract: Join an expert-guided sake tasting in Kyoto and discover 7 distinct styles. Your Japan trip gets better once you truly enjoy sake.

title: Miyajima: Cultural Experience in Zen Temple
abstract: Enjoy your choice of a tea ceremony, a calligraphy lesson, or both while wearing a kimono on a cultural experience in Miyajima. Enjoy the quiet atmosphere in the temple, and ramble around the garden.

title: Tokyo: Meiji Shrine Walking Tour — Shinto & Imperial System
abstract: Meiji Shrine, located in a lush forest, is the most visited shrine in Japan. On this small-group tour of up to 10 people, a local guide explains Shinto and the Japanese Imperial system.

title: Kyoto: 3-Hour Fushimi Inari Shrine Hidden Hiking Tour
abstract: Hike along a secret path to Fushimi Inari Shrine with a local guide. Journey into a secret bamboo forest — an uncharted treasure trove — and admire the red torii gates. Return to civilization after a breathtaking view atop the mountains of Fushimi Inari.

title: Kyoto : Geiko Maiko Dance of Kyoto & Visits of Gion Museum
abstract: The Gion Kagai Art Museum is the first facility in the world for transmitting the Kagai culture, where visitors can enjoy Kyomai ( Kyoto Mai Dance) performances (15 minutes) of maiko and geiko.

title: Tokyo Top Highlights 3h Guided E-bike Tour
abstract: See Tokyo in a unique way on an e-bike tour. Explore the city with a guide as you cruise past famous locations like the Tokyo Stations, and the Imperial Palace, and discover lesser-known gems.

title: Tokyo: Samurai Entertainment Night Show in Kanda Shrine
abstract: Visit a theater restaurant in Tokyo that immerses you in Japanese culture as you enjoy unlimited drinks and a meal. See a show staged on the grounds of Kanda Myojin, known locally as a sacred place.

title: From Tokyo: Mount Fuji Full-Day Sightseeing Trip
abstract: Discover Mount Fuji, an iconic UNESCO World Heritage Site. Explore the Kawaguchi Lake, five-story pagoda, Oshino Hakkai and 5th station on a full-day guided trip from Tokyo.

title: Osaka: Small Group, Big Flavors & Hidden Local Secrets Tour
abstract: Discover Osaka’s real nightlife in Tenma and Kyobashi. Enjoy 15+ curated dishes, local stories, and a small-group experience (max 6) that reveals the city’s authentic, everyday character and charm.

title: From Osaka/Kyoto: Kinkakuji, Arashiyama, FushimiInari, Nara
abstract: Enjoy a day tour from Osaka or Kyoto and explore four must-see spots in Kyoto and Nara: Kinkaku-ji, Arashiyama, Fushimi Inari, Nara Park. Add an optional lunch of local dishes including Kobe beef.

title: Tokyo: Meiji Jingu Shrine and Shinto Culture Walking Tour
abstract: Discover Tokyo’s spiritual heart at Meiji Shrine. Walk through a sacred forest, learn Shinto rituals, and explore Japan’s imperial legacy with a knowledgeable local guide.

title: Kyoto: Samurai Kenbu Traditional Sword Dancing Show
abstract: Learn the art of the Samurai warriors at a show in Kyoto. Be amazed at the grace and techniques of a traditional sword dance that celebrates the ancient culture of Japan's warrior class.

title: Osaka: UTAGE Modern Japanese Taiko Live Show
abstract: Experience a lineup of Japanese musical instruments during the Utage Live Show. Witness instruments like the Taiko drum, shamisen, and shakuhachi, combined with electronic music.

title: Kyoto: Meet-and-Greet, Maiko Show and Experience
abstract: Get introduced to a real Maiko or Geiko (Geisha) of Kyoto for a rare chance to learn, indulge the senses, and be charmed. Watch her dance, interact, ask questions, and take commemorative photos.

title: Kyoto: Nijo Castle, Kiyomizu & Fushimi Inari Guided Tour
abstract: Experience Kyoto’s top attractions on a full-day guided bus tour. Visit Bamboo Forest without crowds, the iconic Nijo Castle, Golden Temple, Kiyomizu-dera, and Fushimi Inari.

title: From Kyoto: Nara Guided Morning Tour
abstract: Discover the rich history and natural beauty of Nara on a morning tour from Kyoto. Visit Todaiji Temple, Nara Park, and Kasuga Taisha Shrine, and interact with the city's famous deer.

title: Kyoto: Traditional Concert at Townhouse or Bathhouse
abstract: Enjoy a traditional Japanese concert in Kyoto featuring koto and shamisen. Choose a townhouse for koto and shamisen or a historic bathhouse for a koto duet with another instrument.

title: From Osaka/Kyoto: Arashiyama, Nara Park & Fushimi Inari Tour
abstract: Join a day tour from Osaka or Kyoto to visit Kyoto’s top spots—Arashiyama, Fushimi Inari Shrine, and Nara Park—with plenty of time to explore. Add an optional lunch of Kobe beef or local specialties.

title: Kyoto: Zen Meditation at a Private Temple with a Monk
abstract: Practice Zen meditation at a secluded temple in Kyoto with personal guidance from a monk. Learn about the principles and techniques of Zazen from a monk and take part in a tea ceremony.

title: Osaka Street Food Tour: 17 Foods at 4 Eateries
abstract: Explore retro Shinsekai with a local guide on a vibrant street food tour featuring up to 17 tastings across four local favorites. Savor kushikatsu, takoyaki, gyoza, and a traditional sushi set.

title: Tokyo: Shinjuku Sumo Show & Experience with Photo
abstract: Experience the thrill of sumo wrestling in Tokyo. Watch live matches, learn about the sport's history, and challenge a sumo wrestler in a fun match.

title: Kyoto: Maiko Makeover and Photoshoot Experience
abstract: Transform into a geisha with a traditional makeover and photo shoot in Kyoto. Choose from 100 kimonos and have your hair and makeup done by a professional.

title: Osaka: A Modern Samurai, Kabuki, Taiko & Dance Show
abstract: Experience Osaka with this entry ticket to Osaka Night Fusion. Take in a show that mixes samurai, kabuki, taiko, and dance with electrifying music and lights for a modern twist on Japanese tradition.

title: From Kyoto/Osaka: Kyoto Top Highlights 1-Day Guided Bus Tour
abstract: Explore Kyoto's iconic sites in one day: walk through Fushimi Inari's torii gates, admire UNESCO Sites Kiyomizu-dera and Kinkakuji, and stroll Arashiyama's serene bamboo grove with an expert guide.

title: From Tokyo: Mt. Fuji & Hakone Tour w/ Return by Bullet Train
abstract: Explore Mt. Fuji and Hakone with a local guide on this day trip from Tokyo. Witness Owakudani volcanic valley, ride the Ropeway, and cruise Lake Ashi. Avoid traffic with a Shinkansen return to Tokyo.

title: Mt Fuji Top 5 Spots Day Tour: Arakurayama Park,Oshino Hakkai
abstract: Discover Mt Fuji’s beauty! Visit iconic spots like Arakurayama Park, Oshino Hakkai, the famous Lawson store. Enjoy seasonal blooms at Oishi Park and hidden gems. Perfect for photos and nature lovers!

title: Kyoto: Hidden Gems E-Bike Tour with Local Japanese Guide
abstract: Are you bored of doing what all the other people do? Travel eco-friendly with e-bike! Enjoy your time in Kyoto with Japanese guide! You will visit beautiful temples and shrines with localness.

title: Kyoto: City Secrets eBike Tour
abstract: Explore the diverse areas of Kyoto on a guided 9 km e-bike tour. Experience, explore, and discover some of Kyoto’s best-kept secrets.

title: Kyoto: Sumo Show Experience with Chicken Hot Pot & Souvenir
abstract: Experience the world of sumo in Kyoto with a live entertainment show. Enjoy unlimited food and drinks as you watch thrilling bouts, learn sumo traditions, and enjoy a beautiful Japanese geisha dance.

title: Kyoto: Calligraphy class at Buddhist temple in city center
abstract:
A special calligraphy experience at a temple with over 1350 years of history located in the heart of Kyoto.
Surrounded by the scent of ink and tatami mats, enjoy the art of black lines on white washi

title: Osaka Sake Tasting with Takoyaki Cooking
abstract: Enjoy your own cooked “Takoyaki” Osaka’s best street food, and special Japanese Sake selected by Sake expert at the hidden spot in Namba.

title: E-Bike Nara Highlights - Todaiji, Knives, Deer, Shrine
abstract: Explore the best of Nara on E-bikes, including some gems off the beaten tracks, and insights with your local guide.

title: Osaka: English Stand Up Comedy Show at Osaka Comedy Club
abstract: Learn about Japan in the most hilarious way possible!

title: Kyoto Fushimi-Inari Night Walking Tour
abstract: Avoid the Crowds and the Heats! Explore the Kyoto Fushimi-Inari Shrine, one of Kyoto's most iconic sites away from the daytime crowds. Explore with our knowledgeable and friendly guide!

title: Osaka:Zen Tea Ceremony and Foot Bath Experience〈45min〉
abstract: We will thoroughly explain the temple, the act of worship, and the rich traditions and history of matcha, allowing you to fully appreciate Japan’s wonderful culture.

title: Osaka: Dotonbori District River Cruise with Drink Discount
abstract: Sightseeing cruise to discover the charms of Osaka from the Dotonbori River. Discount drink coupons for use at GRILLWONDER.

title: Kyoto: Mindful Tea Ceremony in 100-Year-Old Teahouse
abstract: Experience a candlelit tea ceremony merging tradition and mindfulness in Kyoto. Savor matcha, observe tranquil rituals, and reconnect with your senses in a serene setting.

title: Tokyo: 3-Hour Bike or E-Bike City Highlights Tour
abstract: Discover the famous sights and hidden gems of central Tokyo on a guided bike tour. Highly recommended for first-timers in Tokyo to get an idea of the city's traditional and modern aspects.

title: Kyoto: Memory Kyoto E-Bike Tour
abstract:
Itinerary for this tour
1. Golden Pavilion ( Kinkakuji Temple )
2. Arashiyama Bamboo Forest
3. Tenryuji Temple
4. Kitano Tenmangu Shrine

title: Tokyo: Best Samurai Experience
abstract: Experience the samurai experience in a museum-like place with lots of armor on display!

title: Tokyo: Hakone Fuji Day Tour w/ Cruise, Cable Car, Volcano
abstract: Cruise on Lake Ashi and enjoy Mount Fuji on this guided day trip to Hakone from Tokyo. Take a cable car, see volcanic landscapes, choose to shop in the Gotemba outlets or relax in a hot spring.
